_comment: Per-million-token USD prices for the models NanoClaw can run. Update this file when providers change prices — daily cost reports read these numbers. Copy to ~/.nanoclaw/model-pricing.json to activate.
_pricing_note: USD per 1M tokens. `cached_input` is the cache-READ rate. When unset, falls back to 10% of input. Anthropic also charges a cache-WRITE premium (25% over input) on the first call that populates the cache — not tracked here yet; real cost slightly exceeds what the report shows on cache-building turns.
_verified: 2026-04-20 via WebFetch of developers.openai.com/api/docs/pricing and claude.com/pricing
_fallback_comment: Used when a run logs a model name not in the prices map above. Tune this to a reasonable middle so unknown-model costs aren't wildly off.
